meta.description: Complete NLP routing package. Use forward_index + fuzzy_ontology first. Call Claude only if confidence < 0.60.

trust_model.description: Social-graph-first trust model. 75% weight on who vouches for this provider.

pillars.rationale: A friend's firsthand hire is the strongest signal possible. Strangers' reviews are easily gamed. Your network cannot be gamed.

signals.calc: Binary: +40 if ≥1 direct connection rated this provider ≥4.0 stars
signals.decay: Resets if connection removes endorsement or drops rating below 3.5

signals.calc: min(direct_friend_hires × 5, 20) — each additional friend adds 5pts, cap 20
+0.5 per accepted referral from this provider to new clients, cap 5

pillars.rationale: Reviews matter but are secondary to social proof. Volume + recency weighted.
A great provider who cancels is worthless. Completion rate and speed penalised heavily.

signals.calc: completion_rate × 4; any cancellation in last 30 days = -2 penalty
on_time_pct × 2 — % of jobs started within 15 min of scheduled time

pillars.rationale: Baseline trust gate — verified providers earn 5 points. Unverified are suppressed.

signals.calc: Binary: +2 if government ID verified and on file
signals.decay: Expires if docs expire — must renew

signals.calc: Binary: +1 if clean background check passed
Binary: +1 if applicable professional license active and verified
signals.decay: Monitored for status changes via API

signals.calc: Binary: +1 if current Certificate of Insurance on file

pillars.rationale: Tie-breaker only. Experienced active providers get a tiny nudge.

score_bands.label: Top Rated
score_bands.action: Feature first; eligible for Friend Certified badge

score_bands.label: Highly Trusted
score_bands.action: Standard ranking; eligible for bundle assignments

score_bands.label: Trusted
score_bands.action: Normal display; prompt to complete verification

score_bands.label: New / Unrated
score_bands.action: Show with 'New' badge; limit to smaller jobs

ranking_formula.description: Final provider rank score for a given user query
ranking_formula.note: Social proof already baked into trust_score at 75% weight. Price fit and availability are query-time signals.

meta.purpose: Pre-Claude resolution layer. Use Claude only if confidence < 0.6.
resolution_pipeline: 7. Token overlap (≥ 60% token match) → candidate list
9. If confidence < 0.6 → call Claude with context

intent_patterns.example: my sink is not working → Plumber
having a baby → New Baby bundle
drenaje post BBL → Lymphatic Drainage Therapist

intent_patterns.action: Set urgency=true; boost providers with same-day availability
intent_patterns.example: urgent plumber → flag urgency + filter by today-available

intent_patterns.action: Return market average price range for resolved offering
intent_patterns.example: how much does a plumber cost → price range + request quote

intent_patterns.pattern: (my friend|someone I know|recommendation|who did you use|trusted|de confianza|que me recomienden)
intent_patterns.action: Prioritise friend-network providers; boost social proof score
intent_patterns.example: my friend used a great cleaner → social graph lookup
selling my house → Sell Home bundle

negation_rules.note: 'I do not need a cleaner' → skip cleaning offerings
User wants to cancel a service — route to booking management

confidence_thresholds.description: If best match confidence < 0.60, escalate to Claude with: query, top 3 candidate offering IDs, and user context.

fuzzy_ontology.claude_fallback_prompt: You are a service marketplace routing assistant. A user query could not be resolved with confidence ≥0.60 by the ontology. Given the query: '{query}', and these candidate offerings: {candidates}, return a JSON object: {{"offering_id": "...", "provider_type": "...", "confidence": 0.0, "is_bundle": false, "bundle_id": null, "follow_up_prompt": "..."}}
